scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn adds null when input string is null (aString == null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub of DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed
pseudocode: GIVEN stubDfColumn = new StubDfColumn(); DateSchemaColumn col = new DateSchemaColumn(schema, "d", null);

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn adds null when trimmed input is empty (trimmed.isEmpty() == true branch)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub of DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed
pseudocode: GIVEN stubDfColumn = new StubDfColumn(); DateSchemaColumn col = new DateSchemaColumn(schema, "d", null);

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn parses valid date string after trim (trimmed.isEmpty() == false, parse succeeds)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub of DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed
pseudocode: GIVEN stubDfColumn = new StubDfColumn(); DateSchemaColumn col = new DateSchemaColumn(schema, "d", null);

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn throws DateTimeParseException for malformed date (parse error in DateTimeFormatter)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub of DfColumn; exception arises before addObject; no mocking required
pseudocode: GIVEN stubDfColumn = new StubDfColumn(); DateSchemaColumn col = new DateSchemaColumn(schema, "d", null);
THEN expect DateTimeParseException and assert stubDfColumn.addCount == 0;

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn parses with custom pattern (pattern="d/MM/uuuu") and adds correct LocalDate
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub of DfColumn that records added objects; custom pattern must be supported by DateTimeFormatter
pseudocode: GIVEN stubDfColumn = new StubDfColumn(); DateSchemaColumn col = new DateSchemaColumn(schema, "d", "d/MM/uuuu");
